rationale: Gov't Code §2306.046 governs board decision procedures after SOAH proposals for decision. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: The board shall issue an order after receiving a proposal for decision from the State Office of Administrative Hearings under Section 2306.045.
_note: Rule text concerns administrative hearing board procedures; no overlap with homestead exemption valuation.
